creator: stephen@math.missouri.edu
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of x11/accessx,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/108168 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108168
> 

Although I do admit to not actually checking the upgrade, it looks so 
harmless that I am sure it will work fine.  Obviously the MASTER_SITE 
needs changing, because the old one simply does not work.  I did 
actually look at the version upgrade many years ago, and my recollection 
is that it made absolutely no functional difference - that is why I 
didn't bother mess with it.  However it looks like the old version is no 
longer available.

In short, I approve.

Best regards, Stephen
